title: The Guards Close In
description: On pages 14–17, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Punk Hazard Guards, Chopper, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5. The central beat is the guards close in.
scene: The scene focuses on the guards close in, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Punk Hazard Guards, Chopper, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 shaping the Punk Hazard conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, you saw the dragon, did you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It can survive in any harsh climate.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: What kind of... Ughhh... medicine is this...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: How do you feel right now?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Retching... Coughing... I see, very good!!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: The room... it's full of... giant snakes....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...then we have to stop him, now.

summary: The Guards Close In. This part advances Punk Hazard’s rescue mission, Caesar’s experiment, and the fragile pirate–Marine alliance.
